zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Fleetwood於大約1585年出生在英國爾格拉本哈爾時，她的父親Edward Fleetwood34歲，母親Alice Fell33歲。她於1607年2月1日與George Caldwell在英國爾格拉本哈爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1624年在英國藍卡爾頓享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Fleetwood于大约1585年出生在英国爾格拉本哈爾时，她的父亲Edward Fleetwood34岁，母亲Alice Fell33岁。她于1607年2月1日与George Caldwell在英国爾格拉本哈爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1624年在英国藍卡爾頓享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleetwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost place called with Old English flēot ‘stream, estuary’ + wudu ‘wood’, possibly in or near Kirkby in Walton, Lancashire. The existing Fleetwood, Lancashire acquired its name in the 19th century from its founder, Sir Peter Hesketh Fleetwood, and is not the source of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Fleetwood was born about 1585, in Grappenhall, Cheshire, England, her father, Edward Fleetwood, was 34 and her mother, Alice Fell, was 33. She married George Caldwell on 1 February 1607, in Grappenhall, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1624, in Huyton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Fleetwood est née environ 1585, à Grappenhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Fleetwood, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Fell, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé George Caldwell le 1 février 1607, à Grappenhall, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1624, à Huyton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Fleetwood um 1585 in Grappenhall, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Fleetwood 34 und ihre Mutter Alice Fell 33. Sie hat am 1. Februar 1607 in Grappenhall, Cheshire, England George Caldwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1624 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Huyton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fleetwood è nata il circa 1585 nel Grappenhall, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Edward Fleetwood, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Alice Fell, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato George Caldwell il 1 febbraio 1607, nel Grappenhall, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1624, nel Huyton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fleetwoodが約1585年にイギリスチェシュアイアグラップエンハルで生まれた時，父Edward Fleetwoodは34歳，母Alice Fellは33歳であった。1607年2月1日にイギリスチェシュアイアグラップエンハルでGeorge Caldwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1624年にイギリスランカシュアイアハイトンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fleetwood(이)가 대략 1585년 영국 체실르 그랩홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Fleetwood(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Fell(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1607년 2월 1일 영국 체실르 그랩홀에서 George Caldwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1624년 영국 랭카실르 후이턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fleetwood nasceu aproximadamente 1585, em Grappenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Fleetwood, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Fell, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com George Caldwell em 1 de fevereiro de 1607, em Grappenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1624, em Huyton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Fleetwood родилась около 1585 г. в местности граппенолл, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Fleetwood было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Fell, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Caldwell 1 февраля 1607 г. в местности граппенолл, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1624 г. в местности хуитон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Fleetwood nació aproximadamente 1585, en Grappenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Fleetwood, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Fell, tenía 33 años. Se casó con George Caldwell el 1 de febrero de 1607, en Grappenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1624, en Huyton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
